summary: Final QA accepts the Opportunity Analysis Agent after the second REQUEST_CHANGES fix. The prior P1 finding is closed: LLM-output-only unsafe and regulated topics are classified, no-code/no code product descriptors no longer suppress that classification, and explicit safety-policy phrases remain ignored as policy text rather than treated as the opportunity topic.

acceptance_result.notes: All acceptance criteria are satisfied. Required validation commands pass. Regression tests and manual probes verify output-only unsafe/regulated LLM drift, no-code/no code descriptor handling, and explicit safety-policy phrase handling.

acceptance_criteria_review.criterion: Reusable Opportunity Analysis Agent module under agents/ with typed schemas and stable public function.
acceptance_criteria_review.notes: agents/opportunity-analysis-agent.ts defines the typed input/output schemas, tool concept, monetization, risk, score hints, and analyzeOpportunity(); agents/index.ts exports the stable public surface.

acceptance_criteria_review.criterion: Docs-aligned Agent 3 prompt and safeJsonCompletion through injected LlmClient.
acceptance_criteria_review.notes: buildOpportunityAnalysisMessages() includes the Agent 3 opportunity-analysis inputs and risk constraints. analyzeOpportunity() calls safeJsonCompletion() only when an injected LlmClient is provided.

acceptance_criteria_review.criterion: Deterministic heuristic fallback with no external API keys, env reads, network calls, database writes, or paid services.
acceptance_criteria_review.notes: Fallback output is deterministic from the provided Radar Task, keyword candidate, SERP analysis, and SERP results. Static review found no process.env, fetch/network, provider setup, Prisma/database writes, or paid-service integration in the opportunity agent.

acceptance_criteria_review.criterion: Required output fields and score hint clamping.
acceptance_criteria_review.notes: OpportunityAnalysisOutputSchema requires title, summary, targetUser, searchIntent, recommendedToolType, toolConcept, monetization, risk, buildComplexity, scoreHints, and killCriteria. Score hints are normalized and clamped to 0-100.

acceptance_criteria_review.criterion: Risk guardrails prevent promises, constrain regulated topics, and exclude adult/gambling/gray-market/harmful topics.
acceptance_criteria_review.notes: classifyRisk() scans input plus output topic fields. Direct and no-code output-only gambling/betting LLM drift is excluded; legal/compliance drift becomes high-risk checklist framing; explicit safety-policy phrases such as Do not build gambling tools are ignored as policy text.

acceptance_criteria_review.criterion: Focused automated tests cover LLM success, malformed/rejected fallback, score clamping, risk guardrails, monetization/user-fit inference, and deterministic fallback.
acceptance_criteria_review.notes: npm test passes 32 tests across 7 suites, including regression coverage for output-only unsafe/regulated drift, no-code unsafe/regulated drift, and the safety-policy non-regression.

acceptance_criteria_review.criterion: README documents the Opportunity Analysis Agent slice and policies.
acceptance_criteria_review.notes: README documents the public entry point, schemas, prompt/fallback behavior, risk guardrails, no-secret/no-network/no-persistence policy, and npm test/npm run build commands.

acceptance_criteria_review.criterion: No scoring engine, scan orchestration, persistence, API, UI, auth, cron, deployment, real LLM wiring, SERP changes, or paid services.
acceptance_criteria_review.notes: Product changes remain limited to agents/, tests/, and README.md. No scoring total, scan orchestration, persistence, API/UI/auth/cron/deployment, real provider wiring, SERP provider change, env-secret loading, network call, or paid-service setup was found.

tests_run.result: PASS: no whitespace errors; Git printed LF-to-CRLF normalization warnings only.
PASS: Next.js production build completed successfully; nonfatal local @next/swc-win32-x64-msvc native-package warnings were printed.

tests_run.command: npx tsx - <manual no-code unsafe/regulated and safety-policy probes>
tests_run.result: PASS: no-code sports betting output returned excluded/other/none; no-code legal compliance output returned high/checklist; safety-policy kill criteria returned low/generator.

decisions: Accepted the second REQUEST_CHANGES fix because no-code/no code product descriptors no longer bypass output-topic risk classification.
Closed the prior output-only unsafe/regulated topic finding because classifyRisk() now includes output topic texts and regression tests cover direct and no-code LLM drift.

Accepted the safety-policy non-regression because explicit policy cautions such as Do not build gambling tools and Avoid legal compliance guarantees do not classify an otherwise safe opportunity as gambling or legal/compliance.
Performed read-only QA on product files and wrote only this QA handoff file.
risks: Risk classification remains regex-based and should continue receiving edge-case regression tests before broad real-provider use.
npm run build passes but the local Windows environment still prints nonfatal @next/swc-win32-x64-msvc native binary warnings.
The worktree contains JustGoal coordination metadata and untracked reviewer handoffs; they were reviewed where in scope and not reverted.
requested_action: Record final qa_reviewer ACCEPT for M3-OPPORTUNITY-ANALYSIS-AGENT-001 and proceed with lead orchestration or task closure.
